mounts.name: Ebralean Goat
mounts.description: Humans have tried taking advantage of the goats' spectacular climbing skills. Unfortunately, the poor animals found climbing much harder with humans on their backs.

sources.text: Sold by Mount Tamer in Navelin
Not available in the current version.

mounts.name: Eksodean Crocoboar
mounts.description: Crocoboars are an endemic species that used to cause many problems. The locals solved this by selling these aggressive creatures as pets across Siagarta.

sources.text: Not available in the current version.
Found in Vault Chest in Rootbee Cave

mounts.name: Enripian Wolf
mounts.description: Wolves were trained to sniff out treasures hidden under the debris. Sadly, this one lost the sense of smell after a violent encounter with a skunk.

sources.text: Sold by Mount Tamer in Orange Highland

mounts.name: Fountrailian Hound
mounts.description: In the Crimson city of Ramburg, hounds are prized as a status symbol. A deep red robe indicates that the hound's master is a bloodthirsty monster, even by the Crimsons' standards.
